ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the model is active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Text describing the current status of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Text describing the algorithm used in the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Text describing the framework used in the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the dataset table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "mip" REAL /* Mean Information Profile */,
  "sdip" REAL /* Standard Deviation of Information Profile */,
  "ekip" REAL /* Excess Kurtosis of Information Profile */,
  "sip" REAL /* Skewness of Information Profile */,
  "mdsc" REAL /* Mean Distance Score */,
  "sddsc" REAL /* Standard Deviation of Distance Score */,
  "ekdsc" REAL /* Excess Kurtosis of Distance Score */,
  "sdsc" REAL /* Standard Deviation of Score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  "metric_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model the metric belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Text describing any notes or changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Text describing the user's account status */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the team table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being classified */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the classification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the classification was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who classified the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting on the model */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
